3.description: Percentage of trustees with relevant experience. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

4.description: Board composition and performance distribution. This figure presents the distribution of returns for the five main categories of board members and resembles a value-at-risk analysis. Observations are at the LP-investment level. Performance is measured using net IRR minus the (vintage × fund type) group mean. When calculating group means, we split investments into the following fund types: buyout, VC, RE, natural resources, funds of funds, and other PE funds. For each category of board members, we split observations into three groups. The first group includes investments made by a board that has no members belonging to that category. The second group includes investments made by a board that has a below-median percentage of members belonging to that category. Finally, the third group includes investments made by a board that has an above-median percentage of board members belonging to that category. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

5.description: Explaining pension fund performance: Comparison of coefficient estimates. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]
